title: goniothalamus obtusatus
intro: Goniothalamus obtusatus, also known as the oblong-fruit Goniothalamus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Goniothalamus obtusatus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, as well as its ability to protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Goniothalamus obtusatus is typically used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or extracts, which can be administered orally or applied topically to treat various ailments.
